publishedAbstract: - When installing ODF 4.14.4, the deployment csi-addons-controller-manager never gets ready as it keep trying to spin up the pods.- In events we noticed below error ~~~ 77s Warning FailedToUpdateEndpoint endpoints/csi-addons-controller-manager-service Failed to update endpoint openshift-storage/csi-addons-controller-manager-service: Operation cannot be fulfilled on endpoints "csi-addons-controller-manager-service": the object has been modified; please apply your changes to the latest version and try again ~~~- Operator `odf-csi-addons-operator` appears as Installing due to deployment not available: ~~~ odf-csi-addons-operator.v4.14.4-rhodf CSI Addons 4.14.4-rhodf odf-csi-addons-operator.v4.13.7-rhodf Installing # oc get csv odf-csi-addons-operator.v4.14.4-rhodf-o yaml- lastTransitionTime: "2024-07-09T16:51:28Z" lastUpdateTime: "2024-07-09T16:51:32Z" message: 'installing: waiting for deployment csi-addons-controller-manager to become ready: deployment "csi-addons-controller-manager" not available: Deployment does not have minimum availability.' phase: Installing reason: InstallWaiting ~~~- The storageclusters is in error: ~~~ # oc get storageclusters.ocs.openshift.io NAME AGE PHASE EXTERNAL CREATED AT VERSION ocs-storagecluster 65m Error 2024-07-09T15:48:05Z 4.14.4...due to- lastHeartbeatTime: "2024-07-09T16:56:30Z" lastTransitionTime: "2024-07-09T15:48:25Z" message: 'Error while reconciling: failed to find parent StorageSystem''s name in StorageCluster "ocs-storagecluster" ownerreferences' reason: ReconcileFailed status: "False" type: ReconcileComplete ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF odf-csi-addons-operator Installing - waiting for deployment csi-addons-controller-manager to become ready
